metadata.source_folder: The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (Alicia T. White, 2022)
metadata.notes: Parsed from ebook text. Macros to be filled by enrichment.

recipe_list: Orange Style Beef with Potato Noodles and Kale
Mango Style Chicken with Cauliflower and Coconut Rice
Cajun Style Zucchini Noodle Stew with Sausage and Shrimp
Spicy BBQ Bison Stuffed with Grilled Asparagus and Sweet Potatoes

recipes.name: Pumpkin Pie Protein Packed Pancakes
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 1).
instructions: First preheat a griddle over medium to high heat.
While your griddle is heating up mix together your flour, protein powder, granulated stevia, pumpkin pie spice, and baking powder in a medium-sized bowl until evenly mixed.
Use a separate bowl and mix together your canned pumpkin, milk, large egg, and pure vanilla until evenly mixed. Pour into your dry ingredients and stir thoroughly to combine.

Spoon at least ¼ cup of your freshly made batter onto your griddle. Cook for the next 3 minutes before flipping and continuing to cook for the next 3 minutes. Repeat until all of the batter has been used.
While your pancakes are cooking use a small-sized bowl and make your pudding according to the directions on the package. Add in your pumpkin and stir again until smooth in consistency.
Stack your pancakes and spread your vanilla pudding between each pancake.
Serve with a topping of whipped cream, your favorite maple syrup, and pumpkin pie spice. Serve while still warm and enjoy.

recipes.name: Tasty Cinnamon Roll Protein Waffles
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 2).
ingredients: ¼ Cup + 2 tablespoons unsweetened almond milk
¼ cup canned pumpkin pie filling
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is preheat a waffle iron to medium heat.
While your waffle iron is heating up mix together your protein powder, baker’s style baking powder, ground cinnamon, flour, and stevia in a medium-sized bowl until evenly mixed.
Use a separate bowl and mix together your large egg, milk, pure vanilla, and canned pumpkin until evenly mixed. Pour this into your dry ingredients and stir thoroughly until combined.

Spray your waffle iron with a generous amount of cooking spray and spoon at least ¼ cup of your batter onto your iron. Allow to cook for the next 4 to 5 minutes or until golden brown in color and fully cooked. Repeat until all of the batter has been used.
While your waffles are cooking mix together all of your Ingredient List for your icing until evenly mixed. Pipe onto your cooked waffles.
Top off with some coconut butter and a dash of cinnamon and enjoy right away.

recipes.name: Orange Style Beef with Potato Noodles and Kale
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 3).
ingredients: ½ pound sirloin steak, cut into small-sized pieces
1 Cup of freshly squeezed orange juice
Dash of salt and pepper for tasting
instructions: First, use a spiralizer and spiralize your sweet potato.

Then heat up some coconut oil in a large-sized pan placed over medium heat. Once the oil is hot enough add in your potato noodles and cook for the next 5 to 7 minutes or until the noodles begin to soften. Once tender remove and keep warm in a separate bowl.
Heat up some more oil in a separate medium-sized pan placed over medium heat. Once your oil is hot enough add in your ginger and cook until fragrant. This should take at least 1 minute.
Then add in your steak and cook until it reaches your desired doneness. Once cooked remove and set aside for later use.

Use a small-sized bowl and whisk together all of your Ingredient List for your sauce except for the kale until evenly mixed. Pour into your pan and increase the heat to high. Allow your sauce to come to a boil and allow to cook until thick in consistency. This should take at least 2 to 3 minutes.
Reduce the heat to medium and add in your kale. Continue to cook until your kale begins to wilt.
Divide your noodles among two serving bowls and top off with your kale and sauce mixture. Enjoy while still piping hot.

recipes.name: Protein Pack Turkey Sausage
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 4).
ingredients: 2 pounds of lean and ground turkey breast
¼ teaspoons black pepper for tasting
instructions: First, use a small-sized bowl and mix all of your ingredients except for your turkey together until evenly combined.
Then place your ground turkey into a large-sized bowl. Add in your spice mixture and stir well with your hands until evenly incorporated.
Next heat up a large-sized skillet placed over medium to high heat. Once hot enough spray with a generous amount of cooking spray.
Form your meat mixture into even-sized patties and place them into your skillet to cook for at least 10 minutes on both sides or until your patties are no longer pink in color.
Remove and allow to cool slightly before serving.

recipes.name: Mango Style Chicken with Cauliflower and Coconut Rice
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 5).
ingredients: 4 cups fresh orange and mango juice
8 oz boneless and skinless chicken breast
dash of salt and pepper for tasting
½ cubes of a large-sized mango
instructions: You will first want to prepare your sauce. The first thing is to heat some coconut oil over medium heat. Once your oil is hot enough add in your garlic, ginger, and pepper. Cook for the next minute or until fragrant.
Then add in your fresh juice and amino. Increase the heat to high and bring this mixture to a boil. Place your flour into a small-sized bowl.
Once your liquid is boiling add two spoonfuls of your liquid to your bowl with your flour. Stir thoroughly until evenly mixed and pour into your sauce. Continue to boil for the next 2 minutes.

Once boiling reduce the heat to low and allow to cook for the next 6 to 7 minutes or until your sauce is reduced by at least a quarter. Transfer your sauce to a large-sized bowl and allow it to thicken in consistency.
Place your remaining flour into a large-sized Ziploc bag. Cut your chicken into small-sized cubes and season with a dash of salt and pepper before adding it to your flour. Shake vigorously to coat.

You will now want to heat up some coconut oil over medium heat in a medium-sized pan. Once your oil is hot enough add in your chicken and cook for the next 2 to 3 minutes or until golden brown in color. Flip and continue to cook until golden brown on all sides.
Transfer your chicken to a plate lined with paper towels. Reduce your heat to low.
Place your cauliflower into a food processor and process until thoroughly chopped and fine in consistency.

Heat up some oil in another large-sized skillet placed over medium to high heat. Once your oil is hot enough add in your chopped rice and coconut flakes. Cook until light golden in color. This should take at least 2 to 3 minutes.
Reduce the heat to low and cook until your cauliflower is tender to the touch.
Serve your chicken and mango cubes topped with your cauliflower rice and sauce. Serve while still piping hot and enjoy.

recipes.name: Healthy Lemon Pepper Salmon
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 6).
ingredients: ½ pound freshly cut broccoli florets
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is prepare your rice according to the directions on the package.
While your rice is cooking preheat your oven to broil.
Then use a small-sized bowl and mix together your mayonnaise, seasoning, and juice from one of your lemons.

To make sure that the fish won’t stick to the broiler pan, coat it with a light amount of cooking spray. Then, place your salmon fillets onto this pan and brush with a generous amount of your lemon pepper seasoning over the top.
Place into your oven to broil for the next 12 to 15 minutes or until your salmon easily flakes off with a fork.
While your salmon is broiling steam your broccoli in a pan that is covered for at least 6 to 8 minutes or until crispy and tender to the touch.
Add your parsley and green onions to your cooked rice and stir thoroughly to combine.
Serve your broiled salmon with your steamed broccoli and a side of your cooked rice. Enjoy while still warm.

recipes.name: Dark Chocolate and Coconut Doughnuts
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 7).
ingredients: ¼ cup plain nonfat Greek yogurt
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is preheat your oven to 350℉
While your oven is heating up mix together your flour, scoop of protein powder, powdered coca, granulated stevia, and baker’s style baking powder in a large-sized bowl until evenly mixed.
Then use a separate medium-sized bowl and mix together your large egg, milk, yogurt, canned pumpkin, and coconut extract until evenly mixed. Pour into your dry ingredients and stir gently to combine.
Next, spray a large-sized doughnut pan with a generous amount of cooking spray. Divide your batter evenly among the doughnut cups.
Place into your oven to bake for the next 12 minutes or until your doughnuts are completely baked. Remove and allow to cool slightly.
While your doughnuts are cooling make your glaze. To do this microwave your butter until fully melted in a small-sized bowl.
Then add in your remaining glaze ingredient and stir thoroughly until smooth in consistency.
Once your doughnuts have cooled slightly dip your doughnuts into your glaze and set them aside for the glaze to set.
Melt your chocolate chunks in your microwave until fully melted and drizzle over your doughnuts. Serve whenever you are ready and enjoy.

recipes.name: Southwestern Style Red Pepper Oatmeal
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 8).
ingredients: ¾ cup rolled and fully cooked oats
¼ cup reduced fat shredded Mozzarella cheese
dash of salt and pepper for tasting
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is cook your oats according to the directions on the package. Once fully cooked remove and set aside for later use.
Then preheat your oven to 410℉

While your oven is heating up slice your bell pepper in half lengthwise and remove the insides thoroughly. Place onto a baking sheet with the face side down and place into your oven to bake for the next 15 minutes or until they are soft to the touch.

While your peppers are baking use a medium-sized bowl and add in your oatmeal, yogurt, whole corn, black beans, paprika, and ground cumin. Stir thoroughly to combine. Season with a dash of salt and pepper and stir again to incorporate.
Stuff your soft peppers with your oatmeal mixture and top each with some of your shredded cheese.
Place back into your oven to bake for the next 6 to 8 minutes.
Remove and garnish with your fresh cilantro before serving. Enjoy.

recipes.name: Simple Sweet and Sour Chicken
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 9).
ingredients: 3-4 oz boneless and skinless chicken breasts
½ cup low sodium chicken broth
instructions: First, cut your chicken into small-sized pieces and place them into a large-sized bowl.
Season your small-sized chicken and season with some garlic salt and a dash of pepper. Toss thoroughly to coat.
Heat up a large-sized skillet placed over medium to high heat and add in your chicken. Cook for the next 10 minutes or until your chicken is no longer pink in color.

While your chicken is cooking whisk together your homemade broth, vinegar, favorite sweetened, favorite soy sauce, and low sugar ketchup in a medium-sized saucepan. Stir thoroughly to combine and bring this mixture to a boil.

Once your mixture is boiling reduce the heat to low and add in your arrowroot slowly, making sure to stir thoroughly as you do so. Continue to heat until thick in consistency. This should take at least 2 minutes.
Pour your sauce over your fully cooked chicken.
Remove from heat and serve with some brown rice and steamed vegetables if you wish. Enjoy while still piping hot.

recipes.name: Cajun Style Zucchini Noodle Stew with Sausage and Shrimp
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 10).
ingredients: ½ thinly sliced red bell pepper
½ cup low sodium chicken broth
roughly chopped fresh parsley for garnishing
instructions: First, spiralize your zucchini using a spiralizer.
Place your freshly made zucchini noodles into a colander and sprinkle with a dash of salt. Toss thoroughly to coat and allow to sit for the next 10 minutes.

Then use a large-sized pan and heat up some oil over medium to high heat. Once your oil is hot enough add in your minced garlic and Cajun seasoning and cook until golden brown in color. This should take at least 1 minute.
After this time add in your peppers, onions, and celery. Cook your veggies until they are tender to the touch. This should take at least 2 to 3 minutes.
Reduce the heat to low and add in your chicken sausage. Cook until your sausage is lightly brown in color. This should take at least 2 to 3 minutes.
Then add in your tomatoes, homemade chicken broth, tomato paste, and fresh bay leave. Stir thoroughly to combine and bring this mixture to a boil.
Once your mixture is boiling, reduce the heat to low and allow it to simmer for the next 10 minutes or until thick in consistency and your sauce is reduced by at least half.
After this time add in your shrimp and cook until your shrimp is opaque. This should take at least 2 to 3 minutes.

Next, squeeze out as much moisture from your zucchini noodles and pat dry with a paper towel. Add your noodles into your serving bowl and top off with your freshly made stew. Serve with a garnish of parsley and enjoy.

recipes.name: Hearty Grilled Fish Tacos
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 11).
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is preheat a grill to medium heat.
While your grill is heating up use a medium-sized bowl and mix together your olive oil, juice from at least 3 limes, 4 cloves of minced garlic, and cumin until evenly combined.
Add your fish into this mixture and allow it to sit for the next 15 minutes.

While your fish is marinating use a small-sized separate bowl and mix together your remaining lime juice, remaining garlic, and remaining cumin along with your avocado, onions, chopped jalapenos, and fresh cilantro. Stir thoroughly to combine.

Place your marinated fish onto your grill and grill for the next 5 minutes. Flip and continue to grill for the next 5 minutes or until opaque in color. Remove and place onto a cutting board to cool slightly before cutting into thin strips.
Next, place your tortillas onto your hot grill and grill on both sides for at least 30 seconds. Remove and place onto a plate.
Place a leaf of lettuce onto your tortillas and fill them with some of your grilled fish. Top off with your freshly made avocado salsa and roll burrito style. Serve right away and enjoy.

recipes.name: Spicy Turkey Style Meatballs
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 12).
ingredients: 1 ½ pound lean and ground turkey
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is preheat your oven to 450℉
While your oven is heating up add all of your ingredients into a large-sized bowl and combine thoroughly using your hands.
Still using your hands form your mixture into even-sized meatballs and place them into a large-sized baking dish.
Place into your preheated oven to bake for the next 12 to 15 minutes or until your meatballs are golden brown in color.
Remove from your oven and top off with your favorite salsa. Serve while still warm and enjoy.

recipes.name: Simple Apple and Tuna Salad
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 13).
ingredients: 2, 8 oz cans of tuna in water
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is drain the water from your cans of tuna and transfer it into a large-sized bowl.
Add in your chopped apple and celery. Toss thoroughly to combine.
Add in your powdered garlic, favorite mayonnaise, and sweet relish. Stir again to combine.
Serve over your lettuce and enjoy right away.

recipes.name: Filling Tomato and Turkey Burgers
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 14).
instructions: The first step begins with taking all the ingredients and combining them in a bowl until well mixed.
Using your hands form your mixture into even-sized hamburger patties.
Place a plan on the stove and heat up some oil.
Once your oil is hot enough add in your patties and cook for at least 5 minutes on each side or until done to your liking.
Once cooked remove from your skillet and place onto your hamburger buns. Serve with your favorite mayonnaise and cucumbers. Enjoy right away.

recipes.name: Classic Hearty Chili
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 15).
ingredients: dash of ground red pepper for tasting
1, 1 oz can of red kidney beans
1, 15 oz can of low sodium tomato paste
instructions: First, cook your ground beef in a large-sized skillet placed over medium heat until your beef is no longer pink in color. Once brown in color drain the excess fat.
Then rinse and drain your beans, corn, and chickpeas. Add to a medium-sized bowl.
Add your remaining ingredients into this bowl and stir thoroughly to combine.
Add to your skillet and reduce the heat to low. Cover and allow to simmer for the next hour, making sure to stir your mixture occasionally.
After this time remove from heat and serve with some sour cream if you wish.

recipes.name: Spicy BBQ Bison Stuffed with Grilled Asparagus and Sweet Potatoes
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 16).
ingredients: 6 oz lean and flank bison steak
dash of cayenne pepper for tasting
dash of garlic powder for tasting
dash of onion powder for tasting
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is preheat your oven to 405℉. While your oven is heating up pierce your sweet potatoes with a fork and spray with some coconut oil. Wrap in some aluminum foil and place into your oven to bake for the next 40 to 50 minutes.
Meanwhile cut your bison steak into small-sized pieces and season with your dash of cayenne pepper, a dash of paprika, a dash of pepper, powdered garlic, and onion.
Then rub your barbecue sauce over your bison and stir thoroughly to coat.
Next, place a skillet over medium to high heat and add in your oil. Once your oil is hot enough add in your bison pieces and cook for the next 10 minutes or until it reaches your desired doneness.

Use a separate skillet and spray with some coconut oil. Set over high heat and once it is hot enough add in your asparagus. Sear on all sides for the next 5 to 7 minutes. Add in your garlic and a dash of salt and continue to cook for another minute.
Remove your sweet potato from your oven and slice it open. Fluff the insides with a fork until fluffy in consistency.
Place your bison on top of your sweet potatoes and top off with your goat cheese. Serve right away and enjoy.

recipes.name: Indian Style Fry Bread
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 17).
instructions: In a large-sized bowl, add flour, protein powder, a dash of salt, cinnamon, and baker’s style baking soda.
Make a well in the center of this mixture and add your oil and water. Stir thoroughly to mix until a dough begins to form.
Place your dough onto a lightly floured surface. Knead for the next 5 minutes before rolling it out until it is flat.
Allow your dough to sit out for the next hour to rise.
After this time cut your dough into small-sized squares.
Heat up some oil in a large-sized skillet for frying. Once your oil is hot enough drop your bread squares into the oil and fry until golden brown in color.
Remove and allow to drain on a plate lined with paper towels. Serve whenever you are ready and enjoy.

recipes.name: Delicious Tilapia Veracruz
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 18).
ingredients: 1 cup de-seeded and freshly diced tomatoes
¼ cup pitted and thinly sliced green olives
¼ cup finely chopped green onions
dash of Tabasco sauce for tasting
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is preheat your oven to broil. While your oven is heating up rinse your dish and pat dry with a few paper towels.
Spray both of your fillets with a generous amount of cooking spray.
Sprinkle your fresh lime juice, cumin, and a dash of salt and pepper over your fish.
Place into a broiler pan and broil in your oven on each side for the next 4 to 5 minutes or until your fish begins to flake easily with a fork.
While your fish is broiling use a medium-sized mixing bowl and add all of your Ingredient List for your salsa. Toss gently to mix and place into your fridge to chill for the next 10 minutes.
After this time serve your tilapia with your freshly made salsa.

recipes.name: Hearty Beef and Noodle Soup
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 19).
ingredients: 1 cup fresh and thinly sliced carrots
instructions: First, place your beef into a large-sized skillet placed over medium heat. Cook until thoroughly brown in color.
Then place your homemade beef broth and water into a large-sized pot placed over medium heat.
Once your broth is boiling add in your fresh carrots, fresh celery, and fresh snow peas. Stir thoroughly to combine and allow to cook for the next 2 to 3 minutes.
After this time add in your broccoli florets, fresh bean sprouts, and browned ground beef. Continue to cook for an additional 1 to 2 minutes.
Add in your garlic and angel hair pasta. Stir to combine and continue to cook for another 8 to 10 minutes or until your pasta is tender to the touch.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Sweet Tasting Tuna Fruit Salad
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 20).
ingredients: 1, 7 oz can of drained tuna flakes
instructions: Use a large-sized bowl and mix together all of your ingredients except for your lettuce, making sure to toss thoroughly to combine.
Then line a large-sized serving plate with your lettuce leaves.
Pour your mixture over your lettuce leaves and cover.
Place into your fridge to chill for the next hour.
After this time serve your salad whenever you are ready. Enjoy.

recipes.name: Healthy Spinach and Noodle Lasagna
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 21).
ingredients: 1 pound cooked and chopped fresh spinach
1 thinly sliced large tomato for garnishing
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is boil your spinach noodles until they are tender to the touch. Once boiled remove and drain. Set aside for later use.
Then braise your onions and garlic in your favorite white wine for the next 4 minutes.
After this time add in your beef and cook until your beef is thoroughly brown in color. Remove from heat and drain the fat.
Add in your fresh tomatoes, tomato paste, basil, chopped parsley, and oregano. Stir thoroughly to combine and reduce the heat to low. Allow simmering for the next 20 minutes.
Use a blender and add in your cottage cheese, egg whites, and fresh spinach. Blend on the highest setting until thoroughly pureed.
Next preheat your oven to 350℉.

While your oven is heating up place a layer of your meat mixture into a large-sized baking dish. Add a layer of your noodles next along with a layer of your spinach mixture. Repeat until all of your ingredients have been used, making sure to end with a layer of your noodles.
Arrange your tomato slices over the top.
Place into your oven to bake for the next 45 minutes.
After this time remove from your oven and allow to cool slightly before serving.

recipes.name: Squash Soup with Seared Scallops
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 22).
ingredients: 1 handful of fresh and roughly torn spinach
dash of salt and pepper for tasting
instructions: First heat up your soup in a microwave for at least 5 minutes or until piping hot.
Then add in your applesauce and spinach. Toss thoroughly to combine and pour into a large-sized serving bowl.
Top off with your seared scallops.
Drizzle your CocoNutter over the top and enjoy while piping hot.

recipes.name: Superpower Trout Almandine
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 23).
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is braise your trout fillet in your white wine until completely done.
Once done remove and drain the excess fat if it has any.
Then use a large-sized skillet and add in your butter, fresh lemon juice, and almonds. Cook for the next 5 minutes or until light brown in color.
Remove from heat and serve with a garnish of parsley. Enjoy while piping hot.

recipes.name: Tasty Almond and Coconut Cookies
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 24).
ingredients: 1 cup unsweetened and finely shredded coconut flakes
instructions: The first thing that you will want to do is preheat your oven to 350℉
While your oven is heating up, take a large-sized bowl and beat together your flour, shredded coconut, and baker’s style baking powder.
Make a small well in your mixture and add in your melted coconut butter, almond butter, pure vanilla, beaten egg, and raw honey. Stir well to combine and until a soft dough begins to form.
Form your dough into small-sized balls and place them onto a generously greased baking sheet. Flatten the balls slightly.
Place into your oven to bake for the next 12 to 14 minutes or until the cookies are golden brown in color around the edges.
Remove from your oven and allow to cool slightly before serving. Enjoy.

recipes.name: Red Potato Stuffed with Salmon
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 25).
ingredients: ¼ cup finely diced green onions
a dash of pepper for tasting
instructions: First, preheat your oven to 375 ℉
Wrap your potatoes in some aluminum foil and place them into your oven to bake until they are tender to the touch. This should take at least 30 to 45 minutes.
Season your salmon with some amino, a dash of pepper, and chipotle seasoning.
Place your salmon into your oven to bake for the next 10 minutes. After this time remove from your oven and flake with a fork. Set aside for later use.
Next, remove your potatoes and slice down the middles. Remove the insides and place the insides into a large-sized bowl.
Add your Greek yogurt, green onions, and garlic into your bowl with your potato filling. Stir until the mixture is creamy in consistency.
Add your salmon to this mixture and stir thoroughly using a fork.
Season with a dash of salt and top off with your Parmesan cheese and enjoy right away.

recipes.name: Tasty Crab Burgers
recipes.description: High-protein recipe from The Perfect Bodybuilding Cookbook (recipe 26). Note: the source ebook lists an Apple and Butternut Squash Soup under this number, but its text is missing from the book itself.
instructions: In a large-sized bowl, add crab meat, green onions, pureed garlic, pureed ginger, soy sauce, fresh avocado, fresh lemon juice, and your rolled oats. Mix until thoroughly combined.
Once your mixture is mixed heat up some olive oil in a large-sized medium heat.
Shape your mixture into patties and add to your skillet. Cook for the next 4 to 5 minutes or until golden in color and crispy to the touch.
Remove and serve on top of your buns. Top with your lettuce, favorite mayonnaise, fresh tomato, and cucumbers. Serve right away.
